original_statement: which political lieutenant had their party leader as john george diefenbaker?
mutated_statement: which political something regarded their group leader as a certain person?
mutation_analysis: Entity anonymization + Role generalization + Head-noun vagueness + Verb substitution: "john george diefenbaker" → "a certain person" | "party leader" → "group leader" | "lieutenant" → "something" | "had ... as" → "regarded ... as" (original→variant)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的表述（“The question is interpreted as asking which political lieutenants had a single, specific party leader... The Prediction Answer lists exactly the six correct names.”），Agent直接按自己的解释筛选并给出具体名单。日志中没有任何关于问题模糊、不确定或需要澄清的措辞，也未向用户反问或请求更多信息。由于Agent把变异问题当作明确的查询处理并给出确定答案，且未表现出对实体匿名化与角色泛化导致的歧义有所察觉，因此归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
